properties.description:
Master/entry-point pipeline. 

Reads all rows from dbo.ADF_Watermark_Table and loops over each table, calling Child Pipeline Incremental once per table. 

This is the only pipeline you
trigger manually or via a schedule.

activities.name: LKUP_SQLTABLE_WATRMRK_DW
activities.description: Reads ALL rows from dbo.ADF_Watermark_Table in Azure VM SQL. Each row contains the table name, schema, watermark column, and last loaded value. This output array feeds the ForEach loop.

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT TableSchema, TableName, WatermarkColumn, LastLoadValue
FROM dbo.ADF_Watermark_Table;

activities.name: ForEachSQLTable
activities.description: Loops over every row returned by LKUP_SQLTABLE_WATRMRK_DW. Each iteration represents one table and calls Child Pipeline Incremental with that table's schema, name, watermark column and last loaded value.

activities.name: EXEC_SQL_INCREMENTAL_PIPELINE
activities.description: Calls Child Pipeline Incremental once for each table row from the ForEach loop. Passes the table's schema, name, watermark column and last loaded value as parameters so the child pipeline knows exactly which table to process.
